Unlock rapid innovation and robust reliability with AMI’s firmware solutions for IoT, embedded and edge devices featuring Aptio V UEFI/BIOS for Arm® and x86-powered platforms.

For decades, industry-leading manufacturers have relied on AMI as their key firmware partner to help build the intelligent infrastructure of the future. We partner with innovators across the globe, ensuring our firmware meets the diverse performance, power and footprint requirements of any IoT, embedded or edge device you can imagine.

AMI is your global partner for secure, scalable and intelligent firmware and engineering services that help bring the next generation of IoT, embedded and edge platforms to life.
Contact us to learn how our firmware solutions and unmatched support give you the tools to reduce risk, simplify complexity and take your designs to market with confidence.

excerpt.rendered: Unlock rapid innovation and robust reliability with AMI’s firmware solutions for IoT, embedded and edge devices featuring Aptio V UEFI/BIOS for Arm® and x86-powered platforms. For decades, industry-leading manufacturers have relied on AMI as their key firmware partner to help build the intelligent infrastructure of the future. We partner with innovators across the globe, ensuring […]
